narration: After sorting both lists, greedy compares the smallest remaining child with the smallest remaining cookie.
callout: Sorting creates a clean left-to-right matching story.

narration: If the cookie is big enough, use it. If not, try the next bigger cookie.
decision: Do not waste a big cookie on a child who could use a smaller one.

predictionPrompt.prompt: Why use the smallest cookie that still works?

choices.label: To save bigger cookies for greedier children
choices.feedback: Correct. That local choice protects the future matching options.

choices.label: Because any random cookie is just as good
choices.feedback: Not this one. The cookie size choice matters here.

narration: This greedy match works because small needs with small useful resources leave more room for harder matches later.
